title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
What Are the Features and Benefits of E-Insurance Accounts?
People might keep a folder for all important documents, to have them handy whenever needed. With technological advancement, you can do the same now digitally. The significant benefit of having digital access to your essential documents is that they are readily available to you.
One of the set of important documents you may need to keep secure are your insurance policy papers. Here is where the features of an e-insurance account come into view. An electronic insurance account allows you to access all your insurance-related documents, as well as any information regarding the same. It means you can access all the details of your insurance portfolio at one place.
If you have life insurance, getting an e-insurance account might be preferred to have things handy. Before we dive into the features and benefits of e-insurance, let’s look at what e-insurance is.
What is e-Insurance?
E-insurance account is like a repository where you can manage all your insurance policies digitally. When you open an electronic insurance account, it stores the documents of your insurance policies as soft copies. You can access the account anytime by simply entering your login credentials.
It is important to know that there is no charge for opening an e-insurance account.
If you are still contemplating about opening an e-insurance account, read further to know the features and benefits of an e-insurance account.
Features of E-Insurance
There is a range of features of e-insurance that a policyholder may find useful. Here’s a look at them:
Statement of Accounts
The insured person receives a statement of account atleast once a year from the insurance repository with details of all the insurance policies held by him/her.
You need KYC only once
When you open an e-insurance account, you need to submit your KYC documents only once. After doing so, you do not have to submit the same documents whenever you buy a new insurance policy in the future. Instead, you can mention your e-insurance account number to buy a policy.
User-friendly service
Over the years, people often move to different places or have new contact information. You can update these changes to your policy on the e-insurance portal. Doing so online might be easier than going to the branch and doing it physically. Having an e-insurance account allows you to change your details anytime with a click of a button.
Offers a consolidated view
One of the prominent benefits of e-insurance is that you have all your policy related documents at one place. You get a consolidated view of all the insurance policies in a single account. It allows you to track and access your insurance policies whenever required.
No Charges for Opening the Account
Opening an e-insurance account is entirely free of cost.1 You can easily complete the account opening formalities and get your account opened.
Digital Management
You can manage all your insurance policies virtually, eliminating the need to store them in paper format. This makes it easier to locate the policies and also removes the risk of losing policy papers. 1
Benefits of an e-insurance account
The features of e-insurance reflect how simple and easy it is to use. Further, there are several e-insurance benefits too, which a policyholder gets. Having an e-insurance account may be quite helpful, especially if you have several insurance policies from different insurance providers.
Here are some of the underlying benefits of an e-insurance account:
Easy to convert old insurance policies
If you have an old insurance policy, you have an option to convert them into an e-policy.
The policyholders who wish to avail the facility of electronic insurance policy may register
Their choice with the insurer
Paperless environment
Another one of the key benefits of an e-insurance account is that it helps creating a paperless environment. Having your documents online allows you to promote an environment-friendly approach while being efficient.
Keeps your policy secure
Your policies are safer in your e-insurance account. You do not have to worry about losing your policy papers or causing any damage to the policy documents. You can be rest assured that you have the policy papers readily available, in digital format.
You should note that one can create the unique e-insurance account number, only once. An individual can have only ONE e Insurance Account across Repositories5.
How to Open an e-insurance Account?
You can open an e-insurance account in the following steps:
Choose an insurance repository for the account opening process.
Download and fill out the e-insurance account opening form from the selected repository.
Attach the relevant documents with the form and submit it to an approved person, insurer’s branch office or courier it to the insurance repository.
The required documents include a recent passport-sized photograph, proof of date of birth, proof of address, proof of identity and PAN Card.
The repository would verify and process the account opening form, after which the e-insurance account would be operational within 7 working days.
Key takeaways
An e-insurance account is a digital repository for storing all your insurance policies online in digital format.
The e-insurance account gives you a consolidated view of your insurance policies, is user-friendly and helps you track your insurance policies in one place.
Opening the e-insurance account is free of cost.
You can open an e-insurance account with an insurance repository by filling out the account opening form and submitting the relevant documents.
FAQs
What documents are required to open an e-insurance Account (eIA)?
To open an e-insurance account, you need the account opening form, PAN card, date of birth proof, address proof and identity proof.
Are there any charges for opening or maintaining an e-insurance Account?
Opening or maintaining an e-insurance account is entirely free of cost.
How do I update my personal details in an e-insurance account?
You can update your personal details online by logging into your e-insurance account. However, if any change requires the submission of supporting documents, you must fill out and submit the change request form along with the supporting documents.
Can e-insurance help track policy maturity and renewal dates?
The e-insurance account provides you with regular policy updates and reminders, enabling you to track your maturity and renewal dates.
What should I do if I forget my login credentials for my e-insurance account?
You can check for your login credentials in the welcome email sent by the repository when you open the account. The repository also sends the welcome kit to the address you have registered. You can find the credentials in the welcome kit. The third option is to retrieve your ID online by using the ‘Forgot login ID’ option available on your account login page.
Disclaimer
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajlifeinsurance.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Sources
1. https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/wealth/insure/insurance-new-rule-e-insurance-in-demat-like-format-mandatory-for-all-new-policies-from-april-1-2024-what-is-going-to-change/articleshow/108872364.cms?from=mdr
